title: d-c-fix window film privacy Lisboa Red – 45cm x 2m – self adhesive vinyl films for glass windows with a modern flowers pattern – opaque, frosted, decorative for bathroom, home & kitchen
features: CREATIVE TRANSFORMATION of your glass surfaces: Our self-adhesive window film instantly enhances windows, glass doors, and shower enclosures. Stylish window tint design meets effective privacy protection
PRIVACY & LIGHT TRANSMISSION: Our flowers pattern adhesive film offers reliable privacy without blocking daylight. Perfect for living rooms, offices, & bathrooms

FLEXIBLE APPLICATION – not just for windows: Our privacy films are also suitable for glass walls, shower enclosures, and conservatories. Beautiful interior design – window covers can be removed without leaving any residue
EASY TO CLEAN: To keep your frosted glass film looking fresh, just give it a quick wipe with warm water and a bit of washing-up liquid. Even stubborn marks don't stand a chance
SELF-ADHESIVE WINDOW FILM - made in Germany: It’s got sticky backing, so it sticks straight onto any glass surface – no extra glue needed
